response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling, directly aligning with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, containerization, and testing frameworks like Vitest (via personal projects) demonstrates strong relevance. His open-source contributions, architecture flexibility, and demonstrated leadership in process improvement further validate his seniority.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling experience at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and DevOps/CI/CD infrastructure expertise
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in professional context
German language proficiency is only basic, may impact local collaboration
Resume lacks clear metrics on scalability or performance impact of contributions
